column1: {"prompt": "I just received my invoice and there is a line item for 'managed backups' at $15/month but I never enabled that feature. Can you explain this charge and remove it?"}
{"prompt": "Our team's CI/CD pipeline that deploys to your App Platform started failing overnight with exit code 137. Nothing changed on our end."}
{"prompt": "I need to downgrade my team member from admin to developer role but the permissions page says the change requires organization owner approval."}
{"prompt": "Does your platform support running scheduled background jobs, like a cron-style task that runs every 6 hours?"}
{"prompt": "We are being billed for three load balancers but we only have one active project. I think the other two were from test environments we deleted months ago."}
{"prompt": "After upgrading my droplet to the latest Ubuntu LTS image, my Nginx reverse proxy returns 403 Forbidden on all routes. The config file hasn't changed."}
{"prompt": "How do I configure SAML-based single sign-on for my organization so team members can log in with our corporate identity provider?"}
{"prompt": "What is the maximum number of domains I can add to a single Spaces CDN endpoint?"}
{"prompt": "I tried to pay my overdue balance but the payment portal keeps showing 'transaction declined' even though my bank confirms the card is active and has funds."}
{"prompt": "My managed PostgreSQL database shows replication lag of over 30 seconds on the read-only replica. Queries against the replica are returning stale data."}
{"prompt": "I accidentally deleted an SSH key from my account and now I cannot access any of my droplets. Is there a way to recover or re-add it?"}
{"prompt": "Can I host a static website on your object storage service, and if so, does it support custom error pages?"}
{"prompt": "My account was suspended after a payment failure but I've already updated my card and paid the balance. How do I get my services back online?"}
{"prompt": "The migration guide on your docs site has outdated CLI commands that fail with 'unknown flag' errors when I try to follow along."}
{"prompt": "I'm leaving the company next week and need to transfer billing ownership and admin access to my colleague before my corporate email is deactivated."}
